title: Phase 1E: Shared UI - KPICard, EmptyState, LoadingState, FileUpload, SearchCommand
description: Build shared UI: KPICard with metric, trend indicator, and sparkline; EmptyState and LoadingState components; FileUpload with S3/MinIO integration; SearchCommand shell for command palette.
steps: Create src/components/shared/kpi-card.tsx with metric display, trend arrow, and Recharts sparkline
Create src/components/shared/states.tsx with EmptyState (illustration + message + action) and LoadingState (skeleton)
Create src/components/shared/file-upload.tsx with drag-and-drop file upload, S3/MinIO presigned URL integration
Support image preview, file type validation, progress indicator
Create src/components/shared/search-command.tsx with Cmd+K command palette shell
Include recent items, pinned records, and quick action sections
